name: GAF_SyteLine_JobInsert_Tool_v1
description: Create a new standard job (BOM container) for an item in SyteLine

data.api_docs:
Method: POST
Endpoint: /update/SLJobs
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Content-Type: application/json
Body:
The body creates a standard job for an item:
{
  "IDOName": "SLJobs",
  "RefreshAfterSave": true,
  "Changes": [
    {
      "Action": 1,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Job", "Value": "     99001"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Item", "Value": "ITEM-CODE"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Suffix", "Value": "0"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Type", "Value": "S"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Stat", "Value": "F"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "QtyReleased", "Value": "1.00"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Whse", "Value": "MAIN"}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
CRITICAL: Job number is REQUIRED. It will NOT auto-assign. You must provide a unique Job number.
Job number format: right-aligned in a 10-character field, left-padded with spaces. Example: "     99001" (5 spaces + 99001).
Generate unique job numbers using a high range (90000-99999) to avoid conflicts with existing jobs.
NOTE: Action 1 = insert. Type 'S' = Standard job (BOM template). Stat 'F' = Firm.
Example Request:
POST /update/SLJobs
Create standard job 99001 for item FA-20000:
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object indicating success or failure.
Key Response Fields:
- Success: Boolean indicating if insert succeeded
- Message: Error message if Success is false
- Items: Array with created job record (includes Job number and _ItemId)
- Job: The auto-assigned job number (IMPORTANT - capture this for routing and material operations)
- _ItemId: Unique record identifier
CRITICAL: Extract the Job number from the response. You need it for all subsequent routing and material inserts.
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Use this tool to create a standard job (BOM container) for an item in SyteLine.
A standard job defines the routing operations and material list for manufacturing an item.
Always use Type='S' for standard jobs and Stat='F' for firm status.
CRITICAL: You MUST provide the Job number explicitly. It will NOT auto-assign.
Format: right-aligned in 10 chars, left-padded with spaces (e.g., '     99001').
Use range 90000-99999. Use the same Job number for routing and material inserts.

SITE PARAMETER (REQUIRED):
- The <site> placeholder must be filled with the site value from the agent's input
- Format: [TENANT]_DALS (e.g., '<YOUR_SITE>')
